race.comment: Competitive. CHEEKY SMIRK (10) opened this campaign beaten 1.5 lengths over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Has the rails gate and with the extra fitness is sure to prove tough to beat. HAZEL JEAN (15) had been threatening before pulling up with an issue at Hawkesbury. She back after 15 days and finally draws an inside barrier. Tumbles in weight and that brings her right into it. OLUFSEN (9) resumed further improved beaten 2L at Wyong. Should park just off the speed and the longer sprint shouldn't be an issue. Has weight relief and claims. STARBOARD (5) brings a close-up placing from Canterbury where he improved again. Will race handy and is in the mix.
